html_excerpt:
Marketing

These cookies are set by our advertising partners to provide behavioral advertising and re-marketing analytical data. Marketing cookies are used to identify visitors between different websites (e.g., content partners or banner networks). Those cookies may be used by companies to build a profile of visitor interests or show relevant ads on other websites.

Performance

These cookies are used to see how visitors use the website (e.g., analytics cookies). Information collected with these cookies is used in operations to measure website or software KPIs, such as performance. With the usage of these cookies we are able to count visits and traffic sources to improve the performance of our site and application. If you do not allow these cookies, we will not know when you have visited our site.

Necessary

These cookies are necessary for the core functionality of our website and some of its features. The website cannot be used properly without strictly necessary cookies. These cookies are usually set to manage actions made by you, such as requesting website visual elements, pages resources, or user login/off. We can also use these cookies to set up essential functionalities to guarantee the security and efficiency of the service requested.

Cookies help us deliver the best experience on our website. By clicking Accept you are agreeing to the placement and use of cookies as described in our privacy policy.

Questions?

Can I grow food year-round with Gardyn?

Absolutely! Gardyn’s built-in lights, self-watering system, and AI-powered plant care let you grow food indoors no matter the season or climate. From winter to summer, you’ll enjoy a continuous supply of fresh greens, herbs, vegetables, and even fruits 365 days a year.

How much time does it take to maintain my Gardyn each week?

Maintaining your Gardyn takes less than 15 minutes a week, and many people find the care to be a relaxing and enjoyable part of the experience. The system handles the heavy lifting with self-watering, built-in lights, while Kelby, your personal in-app Smart Gardener, guides you every step of the way. Your role is mostly fun: harvesting fresh greens, pruning a few leaves, refilling the tank, and adding nutrients.

Does Gardyn save money compared to buying produce at the store?

Yes! Over time, Gardyn helps you save money on fresh produce. Instead of paying premium prices for organic herbs, salad greens, and vegetables, you can grow them at home for a fraction of the cost. With financing options starting at less than $1 a day, Gardyn quickly pays for itself while providing fresher, higher-quality food than the grocery store.

How is Gardyn different from other indoor garden systems?

Unlike small countertop gardens, Gardyn grows full-sized plants vertically, delivering much larger yields in the same amount of space. Gardyn is fully automated with AI-powered plant care, making it easier to manage while producing more food year-round. Its sleek, natural design also makes it a beautiful addition to your home, not just a food source but a living piece of art.

How does Gardyn work?

Gardyn combines advanced hydroponics with smart technology to make indoor gardening simple. Plants grow vertically in water, not soil, while sensors, lights, and an AI assistant named Kelby monitor and optimize growth. The system automatically waters and nourishes your plants, so you can harvest fresh food year-round with very little effort.

Why should I grow with Gardyn?

Gardyn is the leading smart indoor gardening system that makes it easy to grow your own food at home. With automated watering, lighting, and AI-powered plant care, Gardyn helps you harvest fresh vegetables, herbs, leafy greens, and flowers year-round no matter where you live. You will enjoy food that is fresher, tastier, and more nutritious than store-bought produce while saving money, reducing waste, and adding natural beauty to your home.

What happens if I go on vacation?

Gardyn Membership includes premium features like Vacation Mode, allowing your Gardyn to thrive for up to two weeks while you are away. Automated lighting, watering, and 24/7 plant monitoring keep plants healthy, and you can even check in remotely through the Gardyn mobile app. When you return, you will come home to a thriving plants ready to harvest.

Is Gardyn easy to set up?

Yes! Gardyn is designed for simple, stress-free setup. Most members assemble their Gardyn in less than 30 minutes with no special tools or experience required. Each system arrives with pre-seeded yCubes, so you can start growing and enjoying fresh food right away.

Do I need gardening experience to use Gardyn?

Not at all. Gardyn is built for beginners and experts alike. The system automates watering, lighting, and feeding, while Kelby, your personal in-app smart gardener, monitors your plants 24/7 and provides alerts and recommendations to maximize growth. With Gardyn, anyone can easily grow fresh food indoors with no green thumb required.

What can I grow with Gardyn?

With Gardyn, you can grow over 100 varieties of fresh produce at home, including leafy greens, herbs, vegetables, fruits, and even flowers. Popular favorites include lettuce, kale, basil, mint, cherry tomatoes, peppers, cucumbers, and strawberries. Because the system is fully automated with self-watering and AI-powered plant care, everything grows year-round no matter the season.

Can I grow my own seeds? Can I grow more than what you offer?

Yes! If you’re looking to experiment, you can purchase your own seeds to grow your own varieties. We offer seedless yCubes so you can experiment with ease.
